scripts.publish: npm run publish:win && npm run publish:linux
scripts.publish:framework: dotnet publish src/Junlang/Junlang.csproj -c Release -o dist --self-contained false /p:PublishSingleFile=false /p:PublishTrimmed=false
scripts.publish:win: dotnet publish src/Junlang/Junlang.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true /p:PublishSingleFile=true /p:PublishTrimmed=false -o dist-standalone
scripts.publish:linux: dotnet publish src/Junlang/Junlang.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 --self-contained true /p:PublishSingleFile=true /p:PublishTrimmed=false -o dist-linux
